name: Bellcore-dr1
description: Traditional business-phone ring with a familiar cadence.
recommended: Default choice, shared desks, and users moving from CUCM who want something familiar.

name: Bellcore-dr2
description: Classic ring pattern with a slightly different rhythm than the default.
recommended: General office users who want a standard phone sound without being too flashy.

name: Bellcore-dr3
description: Traditional ring with a more noticeable pattern.
recommended: Front desk, reception, and users who need to recognize calls quickly.

name: Sunrise
description: Bright, pleasant tone with a softer modern feel.
recommended: Executives, managers, and quieter office areas.

name: Chirp 1
description: Placeholder while the exact Chirp 1 audio mapping is verified.
recommended: Do not assign yet unless the audio file is confirmed.

name: Delight
description: Light, friendly ringtone that feels less harsh than a classic bell.
recommended: Knowledge workers, small offices, and users who prefer something calm.

name: Evolve
description: Modern electronic ringtone with a clean professional edge.
recommended: IT users, hybrid workers, and people who want a newer Webex-style sound.

name: Mellow
description: Smooth and relaxed tone that is easy on the ears.
recommended: Executives, private offices, and lower-volume workspaces.

name: Mischief
description: Playful ringtone with more personality than the standard options.
recommended: Demo phones, lab users, and people who like a little personality.

name: Reflections
description: Polished, melodic tone with a more refined feel.
recommended: Managers, executives, and users who want a professional but gentle ring.

name: Ringer
description: Clear attention-getting ring that sounds like a phone should ring.
recommended: Shared phones, reception areas, common spaces, and busier rooms.

name: Ascent
description: Rising modern tone that stands out without feeling too aggressive.
recommended: General office users, managers, and team leads.

name: Chirp 2 candidate
description: Short chirp-style candidate tone for testing alternate mapping.
recommended: Lab testing, IT review, and validating ringtone-number mapping.

name: Incoming_EQ
description: Distinct electronic tone that feels like an incoming-call alert.
recommended: Call center testing, support desks, and users who need a recognizable alert.

name: Vibes
description: Modern, upbeat tone with a more casual feel.
recommended: Demo users, creative teams, and people who want something different.
